channel.title: Um Actually
channel.description: Latest releases from Um Actually on Dropout.tv

item.title: Delicious in Dungeon, X-Men '97, Fallout
item.description:
Voice actors Anna, Anjali, and Valeria talk about moose knuckles, spelling bees, and Stevie Nicks.

Duration: 29:01

Tags: Um Actually, ify nwadiwe, brian david gilbert, trivia, pop culture, superfans, nerds, internet, game shows, unscripted, jumping the shark, how it happened, this vs that, one of these things is not like the other, valeria rodriguez, anjali bhimani, anna brisbin, brizzy voices, jiavani, persephone valentine, tao yang, jacob wysocki

item.title: Wingspan, Matterhorn Bobsleds, Avatar: The Way of Water
item.description:
Kevin, Ally, and Biqtch Puddin' rage against dinosaurs and try to earn super points.

Duration: 31:43

Tags: Um Actually, ify nwadiwe, brian david gilbert, trivia, pop culture, superfans, nerds, internet, game shows, unscripted, jumping the shark, how it happened, this vs that, one of these things is not like the other, kevin mcdonald, ally beardsley, biqtch puddin'
